name: edit_script
description: Edit an existing C# script file. Two modes: (1) Find/replace — provide 'find' and 'replace' to do a targeted text substitution without rewriting the whole file. (2) Full rewrite — provide 'content' to replace the entire file. The path is relative to the Assets folder. After editing, Unity will recompile — wait for compilation to finish before using add_component with modified types.

file_path.description: The file path relative to the Assets folder, e.g. 'Scripts/PlayerController.cs'.

content.description: The full new C# source code content to write to the file. Use this for complete rewrites. Mutually exclusive with find/replace.

find.description: The exact text to find in the file. Must match exactly including whitespace/indentation. All occurrences will be replaced. Use with 'replace'.

replace.description: The text to replace each occurrence of 'find' with. Can be empty string to delete the matched text. Use with 'find'.
